source: Real inbox sample (Gmail thread 19ce8c9ee23f2ad4, 2026-03-13), EVA Summit save-the-date from hello@myeva.org

input.subject: Save the Date: Last Weekend in May for the EVA Summit
input.bodyTruncated: Mark your calendar now for an electrifying weekend May 29-31 in Denver for the EV Summit with the EVA. Three days of EV-industry talks, vehicle showcases, and networking. Registration opens soon. More details to follow.

notes: Save-the-date with vague details — date range present (May 29-31) but no start time. All-day multi-day event, low-to-mid confidence (no venue, no specific schedule). Extractor should pick up the date range + city but not invent specifics.
